violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (tomato slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2025
Inspector observed various items lacking ingredients and allergens listed at the hot-hold self-service station. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025
Inspector observed various items lacking ingredients and allergens at the hot hold self service area. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025

Per interview of staff, blenders are rinsed after each use and are only washed, rinsed, and sanitized at the end of the day. The surfaces of equipment that contacts time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as meats and cheeses must be washed, rinsed, and sanitized at least every four hours. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025

The following food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils were observed with an accumulation of food and debris: - ice machines (both cafe and market) - tomato slicer - "f'real" machine The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC disposed of ice and took machines out of service to be washed and sanitized. Service call was placed during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025

The doors to the outside, located at the front entrance and both side doors, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/12/2025
Milk and frozen product were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler and freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025

The concentration of the sanitizer solution for the wet wiping cloths was 100 parts per million (ppm). The required concentration for quat sanitizer is 200 ppm. PIC refilled buckets. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025
Inspector observed sponge at 3 bay sink. PIC informed and disposed of sponge. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. PIC washed and sanitized items. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025
Inspector observed ready to eat apples on display for consumers. RTE foods must be protected from contamination from consumers. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024
Various beverages were observed stored on the floor in the (walk in cooler). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024
